title: Present Perfect Continuous
description: HAVE BEEN + -ing stresses the duration or ongoing nature of an action up to now.
summary_pt_br: HAVE BEEN + -ing: ação contínua que começou no passado e vai até agora. 'I've been surfing for 3 hours.'

scenes.subtitle_en: HAVE BEEN + -ing stresses the duration or ongoing nature of an action up to now.
scenes.subtitle_pt: HAVE BEEN + -ing: ação contínua que começou no passado e vai até agora. 'I've been surfing for 3 hours.'

scenes.text_en: HAVE BEEN + -ing stresses the duration or ongoing nature of an action up to now. Today's focus: present perfect continuous. I have been training every morning for two months.
scenes.text_pt: HAVE BEEN + -ing: ação contínua que começou no passado e vai até agora. 'I've been surfing for 3 hours.' Foco de hoje: present perfect continuous. Estou treinando toda manhã há dois meses.

scenes.title: Present Perfect Continuous
scenes.body_en: Form: HAVE/HAS + BEEN + -ing. Use for actions that started in the past and are still happening, or just stopped with visible results. 'I have been surfing for three hours — I'm exhausted.'
scenes.body_pt: HAVE BEEN + -ing: ação contínua que começou no passado e vai até agora. 'I've been surfing for 3 hours.'

examples.en: I have been training every morning for two months.
examples.pt: Estou treinando toda manhã há dois meses.

examples.en: She has been learning English since she was ten.
examples.pt: Ela estuda inglês desde os dez anos.

examples.en: How long have you been waiting for me here?
examples.pt: Há quanto tempo você está me esperando aqui?

exercise.question: Complete: "I have been ___ every morning for two months."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I have been training every morning for two months."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estou treinando toda manhã há dois meses.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
She has been learning English since she was ten.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "She has been learning English since she was ten."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ela estuda inglês desde os dez anos.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Present Perfect Continuous — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre present perfect continuous. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You look exhausted today. What have you been doing?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have been surfing since six in the morning.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Six in the morning? How long have you been training for this competition?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have been training every day for three months.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That is impressive. Have you been working with a coach?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have been taking lessons twice a week.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I can see the improvement. Your balance looks much stronger now.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have been practicing pop-ups on the sand every morning.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you been eating well and resting enough?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have been sleeping eight hours and eating clean food.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Keep it up. You are going to win that competition.

scenes.title: Bia's competition prep
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write about Bia's training routine and how she has been preparing. Include how long she has been doing each activity.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At Praia do Sol, the sun rose early while most of the town was still sleeping.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: I have been training every morning for the last three months without missing a single day.

paragraphs.speaker: Coach
paragraphs.en: Her dedication has been paying off. Her wave count has been improving week by week.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: I have been studying videos of professional surfers every night before bed.

paragraphs.speaker: Mom
paragraphs.en: She has been eating so healthy that I barely recognize my own daughter.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The regional competition was only two weeks away, and Bia was finally feeling ready.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Present Perfect Continuous". HAVE BEEN + -ing stresses the duration or ongoing nature of an action up to now. I have been training every morning for two months. She has been learning English since she was ten. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Present Perfect Continuous". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Present Perfect Continuous".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: BBC 6 Minute English
sources.pt_hint: Podcast curto com transcrição — nível B1.

sources.label: VOA Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Notícias e áudios em inglês adaptado.
